channel.title: Quarks
channel.item: <<<<<<< Updated upstream Version 2.1.1 2.1.1 Sun, 03 May 2026 21:03:06 +0000 <enclosure url="https://github.com/CapiFede/Quarks/releases/download/v2.1.1/quarks-setup.exe" sparkle:os="windows-x64" length="18641197" ======= Version 2.1.2 2.1.2 Mon, 04 May 2026 15:11:20 +0000 >>>>>> Stashed changes type="application/octet-stream" />
